nasb.text: O Lord our God, all this abundance that we have provided to build You a house for Your holy name, it is from Your hand, and all is Yours.

esv.text: O Lord our God, all this abundance that we have provided for building you a house for your holy name comes from your hand and is all your own.

cnv.text: 耶和華我們的　神啊，我們預備的這一切財物，要為你的聖名建造殿宇，都是從你而來的，也都是屬於你的。

ccb.text: 我们的上帝耶和华啊，我们为你的圣名建造殿宇所预备的这一切财物都是从你那里来的，都属于你。
